scope_note: QA Witt Tower Orbit Recession Predictor cert [453]. First QA finance PREDICTION cert: extends regime classification ([442]) to forward-looking recession signal. Data: S&P 500 (^GSPC) monthly log-returns, Yahoo Finance 25-year window (N=299 monthly state pairs). NBER recessions: 2001-03/11, 2007-12/2009-06, 2020-02/04. QA mapping: log-return at month t rank-normalized to Z/27Z (0-indexed); consecutive pair (b_{t-1}, b_t); orbit class = S if b and e both divisible by 9 (Singularity), Sat if exactly one divisible by 9 (Satellite), C if neither (Cosmos). Theorem NT: log-returns (float) are observer projections; rank bin integers and orbit class are QA state. CLAIM A: S-orbit months concentrate in NBER recession months at 33.3% vs 8.4% base rate; hypergeometric log10_p=-1.92; permutation p=0.013 < 0.05. CLAIM B (orbit staircase): S->C=0 and C->S=0 in 25 years; direct extreme-orbit jumps are forbidden; all transitions between Singularity and Cosmos must pass through Satellite. CLAIM C: Mean next-month return after S = -1.30% (negative) vs +0.62% after C; neg_rate_S=58.3% vs neg_rate_C=35.7%; gap=22.6pp. CLAIM D (lead signal): Jan 2020 S-orbit state (b=18,e=9) directly preceded the Feb 2020 NBER recession onset -- 1-month lead on COVID crash. CERTIFIED FACTS: (C1) N=299, n_S=12, n_rec=25 PASS. (C2) S->C=0, C->S=0 PASS. (C3) k_S_rec=4, log10_p=-1.92 < -1.5 PASS. (C4) permutation p=0.013 < 0.05 PASS. (C5) mean_S_next=-0.013 < 0 < mean_C_next=+0.006 PASS. (C6) lead_months=['2020-01'] >= 1 PASS. 6 checks PASS. PRIMARY SOURCES: Wall HS (1960) doi:10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 (Witt tower theory); NBER Business Cycle Dating Committee (www.nber.org/cycles). Structural parents: cert [110], cert [442]. First prediction cert in Witt tower empirical chain. Validated 2026-06-18.
